title: Validating a Complex Message Format for a Distributed System
scenario: Generate a prompt that will instruct an LLM to produce a message format that accurately represents the complex structure and formatting of a distributed system, including nested fields, data types, and delimiters. Ensure the LLM output is under 200 lines of code and adheres to standard message format best practices.
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code
Must use standard message format best practices

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated message format meets the constraints provided, including line count and formatting.
Check if the generated message format accurately represents the complex structure and formatting of the distributed system.
Evaluate the clarity and concision of the generated message format, ensuring it follows standard message format best practices.
